hero.label: Pre-purchase car inspection
hero.title: Better to know now than pay later
hero.subtitle: Professional used car diagnostics, body inspection and engine check. Documented report with photos, before you buy.

problem.label: Risk
problem.title: Buying a car without an inspection is a financial risk
problem.text: Most used cars hide defects: tampered mileage, hidden accidents, cleared error codes. The seller has no interest in revealing problems. Only an independent car inspection or professional diagnostics uncovers them.
problem.stat1_label: of used cars have hidden defects
problem.stat3_label: cars are sold with tampered mileage

why.label: Risk factors
why.title: What you won't see yourself
why.item1_text: Engine, transmission, suspension issues invisible to the naked eye. Professional car diagnostics and OBD error scanning identifies them.
why.item2_text: Tampered mileage, hidden accidents, repainted body panels. A full pre-purchase car inspection with paint thickness measurement and mileage analysis reveals what the seller won't tell.
why.item3_text: An accurate vehicle condition report enables informed negotiation. Every defect found is a bargaining chip or grounds to walk away.
why.item4_text: A car inspection costs a fraction of unexpected repairs. Invest in an inspection, save thousands.

compare.label: Before & after
compare.title: What a buyer loses by not checking
compare.subtitle: The seller will always know more than you. Unless you bring a specialist.
compare.no1: Judging the car by the seller's words and listing photos
compare.no2: Tampered mileage, cleared error codes, invisible without tools
compare.no3: Repainted panels after an accident go undetected
compare.no4: “Everything's fine”, then a €1,500+ service bill a month later
compare.no5: Negotiating on gut feeling, not on facts
compare.no6: Pressured to decide on the spot because “it'll be sold next week”
compare.yes1: An independent specialist checks the car for you
compare.yes2: OBD diagnostics, mileage analysis, hidden error scan
compare.yes3: Paint thickness measurement and body geometry check
compare.yes4: A clear report with photos. You'll know before you pay
compare.yes5: A justified negotiation position with every defect found
compare.yes6: Peace of mind that you bought what you actually saw

cta.title: Decisions should be based on facts
cta.text: An inspection takes a few hours. Unplanned repairs take months.
